narrative:
West Chester Twp 25 (precinct in Butler County) has 921 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
